tasks.subject: Implement self-healing agent lineup with auto-replacement
tasks.description:
When an agent errors out (429 rate limit, 402 credits, etc.), automatically:
1. Remove it from enabled_agents
2. Pick a replacement from the disabled pool (agent_specs not in enabled_agents)
3. Rebuild the team
4. Notify the user
5. Track failed agents so they aren't re-enabled in the same session

Key locations:
- stream_agent() at line ~1470 detects skipped agents
- ResilientChatCompletionClient catches the actual errors and returns [SYSTEM:...skipped]
- Need a session-level "benched" set to avoid recycling the same broken models
- Need to handle the replacement mid-stream during BROADCAST mode

tasks.subject: Redesign UI to look like 1990s IRC client with right-side user list
tasks.description:
Transform the Chainlit UI into a retro 1990s IRC client look with:
1. Monospace fonts, dark terminal background, green/amber text
2. Right-side column showing all agents with on/off checkboxes
3. Disabled agents grayed out
4. Classic IRC styling (nick prefixes, timestamps, channel banner)
5. Custom CSS overrides for Chainlit's web components
